race_meta.race_name: BAR 1 Betting 'Proud Sponsor Of Irish Racing' Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked the nagger reidy at position 6 with only 8.0% probability. Top pick was Better Times Ahead (22.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Better Times Ahead > Hgranca De Thaix, but actual result was The Nagger Reidy > Im Slippy. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner The Nagger Reidy had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.3%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
